===Pokémon: Twilight Wings===
Gordie appeared as a visual in ''[[TW05|Assistant]]'' during his battle against [[Melony]].

He physically appeared in ''[[TW07|Sky]]'', where he gave his thoughts about [[Leon]] in an interview while having his meal.

In ''[[TW08|The Gathering of Stars]]'', Gordie was seen in his room at Hotel Ionia with his {{p|Shuckle}} and {{p|Stonjourner}} while receiving an invitation letter for the [[Galarian Star Tournament]]. He was later seen at [[Wyndon Stadium]], walking out onto the field for the tournament's opening ceremony.
